name: Revani (Semolina Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the syrup ahead. In a saucepan, combine sugar, lemon zest and juice, water, and almond extract. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 minutes before removing and chilling overnight.
2. Line a 10-inch-square cake pan (at least 3-inches deep) with parchment paper.
3. Sift together flour and baking powder, then stir in semolina.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat egg yolks, sugar, olive oil, lemon zest, and almond extract until pale and creamy. Beat in the flour mixture, adding orange juice to moisten it.
5. Wipe a separate clean mixing bowl with a cloth moistened with vinegar. Add egg whites and cream of tartar; beat until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg white mixture into the batter.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with almonds.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) for about 45 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from the oven while still hot; slowly pour chilled syrup over the cake.
Makes 16 slices
